cauhoi.de: She ______ to school every day.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Chủ ngữ 'She' số ít, động từ thêm 'es' (go→goes) ở hiện tại đơn.

cauhoi.de: They ______ football on Sundays.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Chủ ngữ 'They' số nhiều, dùng động từ nguyên thể 'play'.

cauhoi.de: He ______ breakfast at 7 a.m. every day.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Chủ ngữ 'He' số ít, 'have' thành 'has'.

cauhoi.de: My mother ______ to work by bus every morning.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Chủ ngữ 'My mother' (số ít) nên động từ thêm 's'.

cauhoi.de: We ______ our homework in the evening.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Chủ ngữ 'We' số nhiều, dùng 'do'.

cauhoi.de: ______ she like listening to music?
cauhoi.giai_thich: Chủ ngữ 'she' số ít, câu hỏi dùng 'Does'.

cauhoi.de: The train ______ at 6 p.m. every evening.
cauhoi.giai_thich: The train (số ít) + leaves (thêm s/es).

cauhoi.de: What time ______ your father ______ home from work?
cauhoi.giai_thich: Chủ ngữ 'your father' số ít → does + động từ nguyên thể 'come'.

cauhoi.de: The Earth ______ around the Sun.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Sự thật hiển nhiên, chủ ngữ 'The Earth' số ít → goes.

cauhoi.de: He never ______ to bed late on weekdays.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Never (tần suất) + chủ ngữ He số ít → goes.

cauhoi.de: I ______ to the cinema last night.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Last night - thì quá khứ đơn, 'go' → 'went'.

cauhoi.de: She ______ a beautiful dress at the party yesterday.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Yesterday - quá khứ, 'wear' → 'wore'.

cauhoi.de: They ______ (not) the answer last week.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Last week - quá khứ, phủ định 'didn't + V-inf'.

cauhoi.de: We ______ a lot of souvenirs during our holiday.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Holiday (quá khứ) - 'buy' bất quy tắc thành 'bought'.

cauhoi.de: He ______ at home yesterday morning.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Chủ ngữ 'He' số ít, quá khứ 'wasn't'.

cauhoi.de: ______ you see the football match on TV last night?
cauhoi.giai_thich: Last night - quá khứ, câu hỏi dùng 'Did'.

cauhoi.de: They ______ (not) happy because the weather was bad.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Chủ ngữ 'They' số nhiều, quá khứ 'were' → phủ định 'weren't'.

cauhoi.de: The film ______ (begin) ten minutes ago.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Ago - quá khứ, 'begin' → 'began'.

cauhoi.de: My mother ______ (cook) dinner for us yesterday evening.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Yesterday evening - quá khứ, thêm 'ed'.

cauhoi.de: When I was young, I ______ (want) to be a doctor.
cauhoi.giai_thich: When I was young - quá khứ, thêm 'ed'.

cauhoi.de: I ______ you tomorrow.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Tomorrow - thì tương lai đơn, will + V.

cauhoi.de: She ______ (not) come to the party next week.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Next week - tương lai, phủ định 'won't + V'.

cauhoi.de: ______ they visit us next summer?
cauhoi.giai_thich: Next summer - tương lai, câu hỏi 'Will + S + V?'.

cauhoi.de: I think it ______ rainy tomorrow.
cauhoi.giai_thich: I think + tương lai đơn, will be.

cauhoi.de: We ______ a new house next year.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Next year - tương lai, will buy.

cauhoi.de: He promised he ______ call me later.
cauhoi.giai_thich: He promised + that clause - tương lai đơn.

cauhoi.de: Wait, I ______ help you with your bags.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Quyết định ngay lúc nói → will help.

cauhoi.de: If you don't study hard, you ______ the exam.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Câu điều kiện loại 1: if + hiện tại đơn, mệnh đề chính tương lai đơn.

cauhoi.de: Don't worry, I ______ forget your birthday.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Lời hứa - tương lai đơn phủ định won't forget.

cauhoi.de: The meeting ______ at 9 a.m. tomorrow.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Tomorrow - tương lai đơn, will start.

cauhoi.de: This building is ______ than that one.
cauhoi.giai_thich: So sánh hơn với tính từ ngắn: tall → taller + than.

cauhoi.de: She is ______ student in my class.
cauhoi.giai_thich: So sánh nhất với tính từ dài: the most + adj.

cauhoi.de: My house is ______ from school than yours.
cauhoi.giai_thich: So sánh hơn bất quy tắc: far → farther (khoảng cách).

cauhoi.de: This is ______ book I have ever read.
cauhoi.giai_thich: So sánh nhất với tính từ dài: the most interesting.

cauhoi.de: The weather today is ______ than yesterday.
cauhoi.giai_thich: So sánh hơn bất quy tắc: good → better.

cauhoi.de: He runs ______ of all the athletes.
cauhoi.giai_thich: So sánh nhất với trạng từ: the fastest.

cauhoi.de: Your car is ______ than mine.
cauhoi.giai_thich: So sánh hơn tính từ dài 3 âm: more expensive.

cauhoi.de: Of the three sisters, Mary is ______.
cauhoi.giai_thich: So sánh nhất trong nhóm ba người: the youngest.

cauhoi.de: This exam is ______ than the last one.
cauhoi.giai_thich: So sánh hơn tính từ ngắn: easy → easier (y→i+er).

cauhoi.de: He is ______ person I know.
cauhoi.giai_thich: So sánh nhất: the kindest.

cauhoi.de: You ______ eat too much candy. It's bad for your teeth.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Lời khuyên phủ định: shouldn't.

cauhoi.de: We ______ recycle to protect the environment.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Lời khuyên tích cực: should.

cauhoi.de: You ______ stay up late before an exam.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Không nên thức khuya trước thi.

cauhoi.de: Children ______ drink soft drinks. It's not healthy.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Lời khuyên không nên uống nước ngọt.

cauhoi.de: If you feel tired, you ______ rest for a while.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Lời khuyên nên nghỉ ngơi.

cauhoi.de: ______ I call the doctor? You look very pale.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Câu hỏi xin lời khuyên: Should I...?

cauhoi.de: You ______ speak loudly in the library.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Quy tắc thư viện: không nên nói to.

cauhoi.de: The government ______ build more parks for children.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Ý kiến, đề xuất nên xây thêm công viên.

cauhoi.de: You ______ do more exercise to stay healthy.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Lời khuyên nên tập thể dục nhiều hơn.

cauhoi.de: She ______ be so rude to her parents.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Không nên thô lỗ với bố mẹ.

cauhoi.de: My hobby is ______ coins from different countries.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Collect coins: sưu tầm tiền xu.

cauhoi.de: He likes ______ chess in his free time.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Play chess: chơi cờ.

cauhoi.de: She enjoys ______ photos of nature.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Take photos: chụp ảnh.

cauhoi.de: ______ is a hobby of growing plants and flowers.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Gardening: làm vườn.

cauhoi.de: They often go ______ in the river in summer.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Go fishing: đi câu cá.

cauhoi.de: I love ______ stamps. It's very interesting.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Collect stamps: sưu tầm tem.

cauhoi.de: His hobby is ______ models of airplanes.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Make models: làm mô hình.

cauhoi.de: She spends hours ______ the piano every day.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Practice the piano: luyện tập đàn piano.

cauhoi.de: My brother's hobby is ______ computer games.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Play computer games: chơi trò chơi điện tử.

cauhoi.de: I like ______ because it helps me relax and learn new things.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Reading books: đọc sách, vừa thư giãn vừa học.

cauhoi.de: You should drink a lot of ______ every day.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Uống nhiều nước tốt cho sức khỏe.

cauhoi.de: Eating too much ______ is bad for your health.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Junk food: đồ ăn nhanh, không tốt cho sức khỏe.

cauhoi.de: To stay healthy, you should do ______ regularly.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Do exercise: tập thể dục thường xuyên.

cauhoi.de: You should eat a ______ diet with lots of vegetables.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Balanced diet: chế độ ăn cân bằng.

cauhoi.de: ______ is good for your bones and teeth.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Calcium: canxi tốt cho xương và răng.

cauhoi.de: If you have a headache, you should take some ______.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Take medicine: uống thuốc.

cauhoi.de: Getting enough ______ is very important for health.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Sleep: ngủ đủ giấc quan trọng.

cauhoi.de: To avoid germs, you should ______ your hands before meals.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Wash hands: rửa tay trước bữa ăn.

cauhoi.de: ______ such as running and swimming help you stay fit.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Outdoor activities: hoạt động ngoài trời.

cauhoi.de: You should avoid ______ drinks because they have lots of sugar.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Fizzy drinks: đồ uống có ga.

cauhoi.de: ______ means helping people in the community.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Community service: hoạt động cộng đồng.

cauhoi.de: We should ______ money for the poor.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Donate money: quyên góp tiền.

cauhoi.de: Many students do ______ work at the nursing home.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Volunteer work: công việc tình nguyện.

cauhoi.de: We can ______ old books and clothes to children in rural areas.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Donate old books/clothes: quyên góp sách cũ, quần áo.

cauhoi.de: Helping the homeless is a meaningful ______.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Meaningful activity: hoạt động ý nghĩa.

cauhoi.de: You can ______ rubbish in the park to keep it clean.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Collect rubbish: nhặt rác.

cauhoi.de: Many people work at the ______ centre to help the poor.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Charity centre: trung tâm từ thiện.

cauhoi.de: During the flood, we provided food and ______ to victims.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Shelter: nơi trú ẩn cho nạn nhân lũ lụt.

cauhoi.de: You can be a ______ and teach children in remote areas.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Volunteer teacher: giáo viên tình nguyện.

cauhoi.de: We should ______ the environment by planting trees.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Protect the environment: bảo vệ môi trường.

cauhoi.de: Choose the word with the sound /ə/:
cauhoi.giai_thich: Teacher có âm /ə/ ở cuối, bird/girl/first có /ɜ:/.

cauhoi.de: Choose the word with the sound /ɜ:/:
cauhoi.giai_thich: Work có âm /ɜ:/, mother/brother/doctor có /ə/.

cauhoi.de: Which word has the sound /ə/?
cauhoi.giai_thich: Summer có âm /ə/ ở cuối, burn/turn/nurse có /ɜ:/.

cauhoi.de: Which word has the sound /ɜ:/?
cauhoi.giai_thich: Early có /ɜ:/, today/about/banana có /ə/.

cauhoi.de: Find the word with the sound /ə/:
cauhoi.giai_thich: Paper có /ə/ ở cuối, her/prefer/term có /ɜ:/.

cauhoi.de: Which word has the sound /ɜ:/?
cauhoi.giai_thich: World có /ɜ:/, panda/tiger/pilot có /ə/.

cauhoi.de: Choose the word whose underlined part is pronounced /ə/:
cauhoi.giai_thich: Sister có /ə/, verb/serve/perfect có /ɜ:/.

cauhoi.de: Find the odd one out (different sound):
cauhoi.giai_thich: Person có /ɜ:/, letter/worker/teacher có /ə/.

cauhoi.de: Which word has the sound /ə/ as in 'sofa'?
cauhoi.giai_thich: Famous có /ə/ (âm schwa), bird/learn/girl có /ɜ:/.

cauhoi.de: Choose the word that contains /ɜ:/:
cauhoi.giai_thich: Certain có /ɜ:/, camera/banana/china có /ə/.

cauhoi.de: Read: 'Minh loves playing football. He plays every afternoon.' What does Minh love?
cauhoi.giai_thich: Bài đọc: 'Minh loves playing football'.

cauhoi.de: Read: 'Lan usually eats an apple every morning. It's good for her health.' What does Lan eat every morning?
cauhoi.giai_thich: Bài đọc: 'Lan usually eats an apple every morning'.

cauhoi.de: Read: 'Nam didn't go to school yesterday because he had a fever. He stayed at home and rested.' Why didn't Nam go to school?
cauhoi.giai_thich: Bài đọc: 'because he had a fever'.

cauhoi.de: Read: 'Volunteering is a great activity. Last summer, my friends and I planted trees in the park.' What did they do last summer?
cauhoi.giai_thich: Bài đọc: 'my friends and I planted trees'.

cauhoi.de: Read: 'Tom is 1.5 meters tall. John is 1.6 meters tall. Peter is 1.55 meters tall.' Who is the shortest?
cauhoi.giai_thich: Tom 1.5m, Peter 1.55m, John 1.6m → Tom thấp nhất.

cauhoi.de: Read: 'You should eat less sugar and more vegetables. Also, drink 2 liters of water daily. Exercise 30 minutes each day.' Which is NOT mentioned?
cauhoi.giai_thich: Bài đọc không nhắc đến uống sữa.

cauhoi.de: Read: 'She will visit Ha Long Bay next summer. She plans to stay there for 3 days.' How long will she stay in Ha Long Bay?
cauhoi.giai_thich: Bài đọc: 'stay there for 3 days'.

cauhoi.de: Read: 'My hobby is collecting stamps. I have over 200 stamps from 15 countries. It started 3 years ago.' How long has the writer collected stamps?
cauhoi.giai_thich: Bài đọc: 'It started 3 years ago'.

cauhoi.de: Read: 'If you have a toothache, you shouldn't eat sweets. You should see a dentist.' What should you do?
cauhoi.giai_thich: Bài đọc: 'You should see a dentist'.

cauhoi.de: Read: 'There are four seasons: spring, summer, autumn, winter. Summer is the hottest. Winter is the coldest.' Which season is the coldest?
cauhoi.giai_thich: Bài đọc: 'Winter is the coldest'.
